description_long: This is a heavy-duty, industrial-style shelving unit with three spacious rectangular shelves supported by a robust blue metal frame. The shelves appear to be made of thick, brown wood or particleboard, each encased in a metallic border for added strength and durability. The vertical supports are perforated blue steel beams, likely designed for adjustable shelf placement and increased structural integrity. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it suitable for storing large or bulky items. The overall construction suggests it is intended for use in garages, workshops, warehouses, or other urban utility spaces. There are no doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its function as an open storage solution.
description: A sturdy, open-frame shelving unit with three wooden shelves and a blue perforated metal frame, ideal for industrial or garage storage. The design is robust and accessible from all sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three wooden shelves and the blue metal frame, with clear visibility of the shelf surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the perforated blue metal supports, with less visibility of the shelf surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the back edges of the shelves and the blue frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the shelf depth and the blue metal supports, mirroring view 1.
